command:
uv run python -u -c 
import urllib.request
import json
# Try NCBI ID converter
doi = '10.1016/j.celrep.2025.116833'
url = f'https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/utils/idconv/v1.0/?tool=neuron-channels-arf&email=a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk&ids={doi}&format=json'
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'neuron-channels-arf'})
try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as resp:
        data = json.loads(resp.read())
    print(json.dumps(data, indent=2))
except Exception as e:
    print('err', repr(e))
